Z1.narrative: Prototype response recommendation for Zone Z1: pause active hot work, account for personnel, verify the atmosphere, and have the designated incident lead assess evacuation under plant procedures. The cited hazardous-process and work-permit sources provide context for this rehearsal; they do not replace plant-specific emergency instructions. [fa-41b] [fa-41c] [fa-41h] [oisd-105]

actions: Notify the designated incident lead to assess evacuation and account for personnel at the designated muster point.
Suspend hot work and isolate ignition sources until the atmosphere is verified safe.
Record the event, preserve the sensor and permit timeline, and authorize re-entry only after competent review.
timeline: 0 min — Aegis Command enters ALARM and presents a local response recommendation.
0–5 min — secure the permit boundary, verify personnel accountability, and reassess the atmosphere.
Before re-entry — competent review confirms controls and the permit conditions.
